name: Yogurt Soup (Turkish)
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring the rice to a boil in meat or chicken broth on low heat.
2. Beat yogurt with egg yolks and flour. Stirring constantly, slowly add 2 cups of boiling stock. Add it to the meat stock with rice. Let simmer for 10 minutes.
3. Heat butter. Add dried mint. Leave on low heat for 1 minute. Pour over the soup and serve.
